name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12188 Blue] This Cléa wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft grained leather, highlighting the eye-catching Monogram embossing with a dual-tone effect. The compact design includes a bill compartment, zip coin pocket, and card slots. 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm (L x H x W)
